name: the technology-level family_activated list remains available alongside the family-level families_active
command: bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/full-surface-intake.sh" --workload "migrate from Angular to Ember" --classify 2>/dev/null | ruby -rjson -e 'd=JSON.parse(STDIN.read); exit(d["workload_classification"]["family_activated"]==["angular","ember"] && d["families_active"]==["frontend"] ? 0:1)' && echo tech-and-family-lists 1>&2
